'''Mercedes Ngoh''' is a Canadian singer, dancer, actress and yoga instructor. She portrayed [[Rystáll Sant]] in the [[1997]] [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Return of the Jedi]]. Ngoh currently lives in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]].

{{Bio-stub}}
